description: Expand AI Memory schema to 8 categories, add per-memory access scopes, TTL expiration, explicit-signal requirement (anti-creep), and weekly digest candidate system. Enhance ContextGraph with Phase 26 node/edge types.
steps: Step 1: Update packages/ai-memory/src/types.ts - expand MemoryCategory to 8 categories: 'people', 'places', 'projects', 'preferences', 'skills', 'goals', 'schedules', 'routines'. Add MemoryAccessScope type (array of app names that can read the memory). Add MemorySource type to distinguish explicit ('remember-this') vs candidate ('pattern-detected'). Add approved/pending status for candidates. Add 'tags' field for search/purge-by-topic. Update MemoryEntrySchema zod schema accordingly.

Step 2: Update packages/ai-memory/src/memory-store.ts - add accessScopes field to MemoryEntry handling. Add a 'writeSignal' field that must be 'explicit' | 'digest-approved' for a memory to be active (anti-creep gate). Add methods: createCandidate() for pattern-detected memories (status=pending), approveCandidate(id), rejectCandidate(id), getPendingCandidates(userId) for weekly digest, purgeByTag(userId, tag) for 'forget everything about Z'. Enforce that create() requires writeSignal='explicit'.

Step 3: Update packages/ai-memory/src/memory-export.ts - add encrypted export using Web Crypto API (AES-GCM with user-provided key). Add exportEncrypted(userId, key: CryptoKey): Promise<ArrayBuffer> and importEncrypted(data: ArrayBuffer, key: CryptoKey): Promise<MemoryEntry[]>. Plain JSON export/import remains for non-encrypted use. Ensure roundtrip byte-exact for unencrypted JSON (deterministic serialization).
Step 4: Update packages/ai-memory/src/index.ts to export new types and methods.

Step 5: Update packages/identity-permissions/src/types.ts - add new ResourceType values if needed for context graph ('person', 'conversation', 'project', 'event' - map to existing types where possible). Add ContextEdgeType as a union: 'mentioned-in' | 'attended' | 'edited' | 'shared-with' | 'related-to'.

Step 6: Update packages/identity-permissions/src/core/context-graph.ts - use typed edges (ContextEdgeType instead of raw string). Add getEdgesByType(nodeId, edgeType) method. Add findPath(fromId, toId, maxDepth) for agent grounding. Add getNodesByMetadata(key, value, workspaceId) for richer queries.

Step 7: Update packages/ai-memory/src/__tests__/ai-memory.test.ts - add tests for: 8 categories accepted, createCandidate creates pending entry, approveCandidate transitions to active, rejectCandidate removes, purgeByTag deletes all matching, create() without writeSignal='explicit' fails (anti-creep), accessScopes filtering, encrypted export/import roundtrip, unencrypted JSON roundtrip byte-exact.
Step 8: Update packages/identity-permissions/src/__tests__/context-graph.test.ts - add tests for typed edges, getEdgesByType, findPath, getNodesByMetadata.
acceptance_criteria: MemoryCategory type has exactly 8 values: people, places, projects, preferences, skills, goals, schedules, routines
AIMemoryStore.create() enforces writeSignal='explicit' - throws/returns null without it
AIMemoryStore.createCandidate() creates pending memory, approveCandidate() activates it with writeSignal='digest-approved'
purgeByTag(userId, tag) removes all memories with that tag
MemoryExporter.exportEncrypted and importEncrypted perform AES-GCM roundtrip
Plain JSON export -> import roundtrip produces identical entries (byte-exact serialization)
ContextGraph supports typed edges and getEdgesByType returns only matching edges
All existing tests still pass, new tests pass
pnpm turbo typecheck passes for ai-memory and identity-permissions
findings: All verification gates pass (typecheck, test, build, lint). Pre-commit hooks enforce 100-char line length on commit body lines and header. Prettier reformats on commit via lint-staged. The identity-permissions MemoryEntry type (used by MemoryManager) is separate from ai-memory MemoryEntry and was not affected.
